name: LENSAR, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Bu siness We are a commercial-stage medical device company focused on designing, developing and marketing advanced laser systems for the treatment of cataracts and the management of pre-existing or surgically induced corneal astigmatism. Our current systems, the LENSAR Laser System, or LLS, and ALLY Robotic Cataract Laser System , or ALLY System, or collectively, the Systems, incorporate a range of proprietary technologies designed to assist the surgeon in obtaining better visual ...
